verses.latin_vulgate: Et factum est in anno quarto Joakim filii Josiæ regis Juda, factum est verbum hoc ad Jeremiam a Domino, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ בַּשָּׁנָ֣ה הָרְבִעִ֔ית לִיהוֹיָקִ֥ים בֶּן־יֹאשִׁיָּ֖הוּ מֶ֣לֶךְ יְהוּדָ֑ה הָיָ֞ה הַדָּבָ֤ר הַזֶּה֙ אֶֽל־יִרְמְיָ֔הוּ מֵאֵ֥ת יְהֹוָ֖ה לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it came to pass in the fourth year of Joakim the son of Josias king of Juda, that this word came to Jeremiah by the Lord, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Neljäntenä Jojakimin Josian pojan, Juudan kuninkaan vuonna, tapahtui tämä sana Herralta Jeremialle, sanoen:
verses.king_james: And it came to pass in the fourth year of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah king of Judah, that this word came unto Jeremiah from the Lord, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Tolle volumen libri, et scribes in eo omnia verba quæ locutus sum tibi adversum Israël et Judam, et adversum omnes gentes, a die qua locutus sum ad te ex diebus Josiæ usque ad diem hanc :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קַח־לְךָ֮ מְגִלַּת־סֵ֒פֶר֒ וְכָתַבְתָּ֣ אֵלֶ֗יהָ אֵ֣ת כׇּל־הַדְּבָרִ֞ים אֲשֶׁר־דִּבַּ֧רְתִּי אֵלֶ֛יךָ עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֥ל וְעַל־יְהוּדָ֖ה וְעַל־כׇּל־הַגּוֹיִ֑ם מִיּ֞וֹם דִּבַּ֤רְתִּי אֵלֶ֙יךָ֙ מִימֵ֣י יֹאשִׁיָּ֔הוּ וְעַ֖ד הַיּ֥וֹם הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Take thee a roll of a book, and thou shalt write in it all the words that I have spoken to thee against Israel and Juda, and against all the nations from the day that I spoke to thee, from the days of Josias even to this day.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ota kirja ja kirjoita siihen kaikki se puhe, jonka minä sinulle olen puhunut Israelista, Juudasta ja kaikesta kansasta, siitä ajasta kuin minä sinulle olen puhunut, Joosian ajasta, niin tähän päivään asti.
verses.king_james: Take thee a roll of a book, and write therein all the words that I have spoken unto thee against Israel, and against Judah, and against all the nations, from the day I spake unto thee, from the days of Josiah, even unto this day.

verses.latin_vulgate: si forte, audiente domo Juda universa mala quæ ego cogito facere eis, revertatur unusquisque a via sua pessima, et propitius ero iniquitati et peccato eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אוּלַ֤י יִשְׁמְעוּ֙ בֵּ֣ית יְהוּדָ֔ה אֵ֚ת כׇּל־הָ֣רָעָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֛ר אָנֹכִ֥י חֹשֵׁ֖ב לַעֲשׂ֣וֹת לָהֶ֑ם לְמַ֣עַן יָשׁ֗וּבוּ אִ֚ישׁ מִדַּרְכּ֣וֹ הָרָעָ֔ה וְסָלַחְתִּ֥י לַעֲוֺנָ֖ם וּלְחַטָּאתָֽם׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: If so be, when the house of Juda shall hear all the evils that I purpose to do unto them, that they may return every man from his wicked way: and I will forgive their iniquity, and their sin.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jos mitämaks Juudan huone, kuin he kuulevat kaiken sen onnettomuuden, joka minun mielessäni on heille tehdä, on itsensä kääntävä, jokainen pahasta menostansa, että minä antaisin anteeksi heidän pahat tekonsa ja rikoksensa.
verses.king_james: It may be that the house of Judah will hear all the evil which I purpose to do unto them; that they may return every man from his evil way; that I may forgive their iniquity and their sin.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vocavit ergo Jeremias Baruch filium Neriæ : et scripsit Baruch ex ore Jeremiæ omnes sermones Domini quos locutus est ad eum, in volumine libri :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְרָ֣א יִרְמְיָ֔הוּ אֶת־בָּר֖וּךְ בֶּן־נֵֽרִיָּ֑ה וַיִּכְתֹּ֨ב בָּר֜וּךְ מִפִּ֣י יִרְמְיָ֗הוּ אֵ֣ת כׇּל־דִּבְרֵ֧י יְהֹוָ֛ה אֲשֶׁר־דִּבֶּ֥ר אֵלָ֖יו עַל־מְגִלַּת־סֵֽפֶר׃
verses.douay_rheims: So Jeremiah called Baruch the son of Nerias: and Baruch wrote from the mouth of Jeremiah all the words of the Lord, which he spoke to him, upon the roll of a book.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin Jeremia kutsui Barukin, Nerijan pojan, ja Baruk kirjoitti kirjaan Jeremian suusta kaikki Herran sanat, jotka hän hänelle oli puhunut.
verses.king_james: Then Jeremiah called Baruch the son of Neriah: and Baruch wrote from the mouth of Jeremiah all the words of the Lord, which he had spoken unto him, upon a roll of a book.

verses.latin_vulgate: et præcepit Jeremias Baruch, dicens : Ego clausus sum, nec valeo ingredi domum Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְצַוֶּ֣ה יִרְמְיָ֔הוּ אֶת־בָּר֖וּךְ לֵאמֹ֑ר אֲנִ֣י עָצ֔וּר לֹ֣א אוּכַ֔ל לָב֖וֹא בֵּ֥ית יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Jeremiah commanded Baruch, saying: I am shut up, and cannot go into the house of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jeremia käski Barukia ja sanoi: minä olen vangittu, niin etten saa mennä Herran huoneeseen.
verses.king_james: And Jeremiah commanded Baruch, saying, I am shut up; I cannot go into the house of the Lord:

verses.latin_vulgate: Ingredere ergo tu, et lege de volumine in quo scripsisti ex ore meo verba Domini, audiente populo in domo Domini, in die jejunii : insuper et audiente universo Juda qui veniunt de civitatibus suis, leges eis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבָאתָ֣ אַתָּ֡ה וְקָרָ֣אתָ בַמְּגִלָּ֣ה אֲשֶׁר־כָּתַֽבְתָּ־מִפִּי֩ אֶת־דִּבְרֵ֨י יְהֹוָ֜ה בְּאׇזְנֵ֥י הָעָ֛ם בֵּ֥ית יְהֹוָ֖ה בְּי֣וֹם צ֑וֹם וְגַ֨ם בְּאׇזְנֵ֧י כׇל־יְהוּדָ֛ה הַבָּאִ֥ים מֵעָרֵיהֶ֖ם תִּקְרָאֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Go thou in therefore, and read out of the volume, which thou hast written from my mouth, the words of the Lord, in the hearing of all the people in the house of the Lord on the fasting day: and also thou shalt read them in the hearing of all Juda that come out of their cities:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta mene sinä sinne ja lue kirja, johon sinä Herran sanat minun suustani kirjoittanut olet, kansan korvain edessä Herran huoneessa, paastopäivänä; ja sinun pitää myös ne lukeman koko Juudan korvain edessä, jotka heidän kaupungeistansa tulleet ovat.
verses.king_james: Therefore go thou, and read in the roll, which thou hast written from my mouth, the words of the Lord in the ears of the people in the Lord’s house upon the fasting day: and also thou shalt read them in the ears of all Judah that come out of their cities.

verses.latin_vulgate: si forte cadat oratio eorum in conspectu Domini, et revertatur unusquisque a via sua pessima : quoniam magnus furor et indignatio est quam locutus est Dominus adversus populum hunc.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אוּלַ֞י תִּפֹּ֤ל תְּחִנָּתָם֙ לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה וְיָשֻׁ֕בוּ אִ֖ישׁ מִדַּרְכּ֣וֹ הָרָעָ֑ה כִּֽי־גָד֤וֹל הָאַף֙ וְהַ֣חֵמָ֔ה אֲשֶׁר־דִּבֶּ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶל־הָעָ֥ם הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: If so be they may present their supplication before the Lord, and may return every one from his wicked way: for great is the wrath and indignation which the Lord hath pronounced against this people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jos he mitämaks nöyryyttävät itsensä rukouksella Herran edessä, ja kääntyvät jokainen pahasta menostansa; sillä viha ja julmuus on suuri, jonka Herra on tätä kansaa vastaan puhunut.
verses.king_james: It may be they will present their supplication before the Lord, and will return every one from his evil way: for great is the anger and the fury that the Lord hath pronounced against this people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et fecit Baruch filius Neriæ juxta omnia quæ præceperat ei Jeremias propheta, legens ex volumine sermones Domini in domo Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֗עַשׂ בָּרוּךְ֙ בֶּן־נֵ֣רִיָּ֔ה כְּכֹ֥ל אֲשֶׁר־צִוָּ֖הוּ יִרְמְיָ֣הוּ הַנָּבִ֑יא לִקְרֹ֥א בַסֵּ֛פֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה בֵּ֥ית יְהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Baruch the son of Nerias did according to all that Jeremiah the prophet ,had commanded him, reading out of the volume the words of the Lord in the house of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Baruk Nerijan poika teki kaikki, mitä propheta Jeremia oli hänelle käskenyt, ja luki ja luki kirjasta Herran sanat kirjasta Herran huoneessa.
verses.king_james: And Baruch the son of Neriah did according to all that Jeremiah the prophet commanded him, reading in the book the words of the Lord in the Lord’s house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Factum est autem in anno quinto Joakim filii Josiæ regis Juda, in mense nono : prædicaverunt jejunium in conspectu Domini omni populo in Jerusalem, et universæ multitudini quæ confluxerat de civitatibus Juda in Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֣י בַשָּׁנָ֣ה הַ֠חֲמִשִׁ֠ית לִיהוֹיָקִ֨ים בֶּן־יֹאשִׁיָּ֤הוּ מֶֽלֶךְ־יְהוּדָה֙ בַּחֹ֣דֶשׁ הַתְּשִׁעִ֔י קָרְא֨וּ צ֜וֹם לִפְנֵ֧י יְהֹוָ֛ה כׇּל־הָעָ֖ם בִּירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם וְכׇל־הָעָ֗ם הַבָּאִ֛ים מֵעָרֵ֥י יְהוּדָ֖ה בִּירוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it came to pass in the fifth year of Joakim the son of Josias king of Juda, in the ninth month, that they proclaimed a fast before the Lord to all the people in Jerusalem, and to all the people that were come together out of the cities of Juda to Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta tapahtui Jojakimin Josian pojan, Juudan kuninkaan, viidentenä vuonna ja yhdeksäntenä kuukautena, että paasto kuulutettiin Herran edessä kaikelle kansalle Jerusalemissa, ja kaikelle kansalle, joka Juudan kaupungeista tuli Jerusalemiin.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass in the fifth year of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah king of Judah, in the ninth month, that they proclaimed a fast before the Lord to all the people in Jerusalem, and to all the people that came from the cities of Judah unto Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Legitque Baruch ex volumine sermones Jeremiæ in domo Domini, in gazophylacio Gamariæ filii Saphan scribæ, in vestibulo superiori, in introitu portæ novæ domus Domini, audiente omni populo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְרָ֨א בָר֥וּךְ בַּסֵּ֛פֶר אֶת־דִּבְרֵ֥י יִרְמְיָ֖הוּ בֵּ֣ית יְהֹוָ֑ה בְּלִשְׁכַּ֡ת גְּמַרְיָ֩הוּ֩ בֶן־שָׁפָ֨ן הַסֹּפֵ֜ר בֶּחָצֵ֣ר הָעֶלְי֗וֹן פֶּ֣תַח שַׁ֤עַר בֵּית־יְהֹוָה֙ הֶחָדָ֔שׁ בְּאׇזְנֵ֖י כׇּל־הָעָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Baruch read out of the volume the words of Jeremiah in the house of the Lord, in the treasury of Gamarias the son of Saphan the scribe, in the upper court, in the entry of the new gate of the house of the Lord, in the hearing of all the people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Baruk luki kirjasta Jeremian sanat Herran huoneessa, Gemarian, Saphanin pojan kirjoittajan kammiossa, ylemmäisessä pihassa, Herran huoneen uuden ovein edessä, kaiken kansan kuullen.
verses.king_james: Then read Baruch in the book the words of Jeremiah in the house of the Lord, in the chamber of Gemariah the son of Shaphan the scribe, in the higher court, at the entry of the new gate of the Lord’s house, in the ears of all the people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque audisset Michæas filius Gamariæ filii Saphan omnes sermones Domini ex libro,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֠יִּשְׁמַ֠ע מִכָ֨יְהוּ בֶן־גְּמַרְיָ֧הוּ בֶן־שָׁפָ֛ן אֶת־כׇּל־דִּבְרֵ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה מֵעַ֥ל הַסֵּֽפֶר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when Micheas the son of Gamarias the son of Saphan had heard out of the book all the words of the Lord,
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Mikaja Gemarian poika, Saphanin pojan, kaikki Herran sanat kirjasta oli kuullut,
verses.king_james: When Michaiah the son of Gemariah, the son of Shaphan, had heard out of the book all the words of the Lord,

verses.latin_vulgate: descendit in domum regis, ad gazophylacium scribæ, et ecce ibi omnes principes sedebant : Elisama scriba, et Dalaias filius Semeiæ, et Elnathan filius Achobor, et Gamarias filius Saphan, et Sedecias filius Hananiæ, et universi principes :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֤רֶד בֵּית־הַמֶּ֙לֶךְ֙ עַל־לִשְׁכַּ֣ת הַסֹּפֵ֔ר וְהִ֨נֵּה־שָׁ֔ם כׇּל־הַשָּׂרִ֖ים יוֹשְׁבִ֑ים אֱלִישָׁמָ֣ע הַסֹּפֵ֡ר וּדְלָיָ֣הוּ בֶן־שְׁ֠מַֽעְיָ֠הוּ וְאֶלְנָתָ֨ן בֶּן־עַכְבּ֜וֹר וּגְמַרְיָ֧הוּ בֶן־שָׁפָ֛ן וְצִדְקִיָּ֥הוּ בֶן־חֲנַנְיָ֖הוּ וְכׇל־הַשָּׂרִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: He went down into the king's house to the secretary's chamber: and behold all the princes sat there, Elisama the scribe, and Dalaias the son of Semeias, and Elnathan the son of Achobor, and Gamarias the son of Saphan, and Sedecias the son of Hananias, and all the princes.
verses.finnish_biblia: Meni hän alas kuninkaan huoneeseen, kirjoittajan kammioon, ja katso, siellä istuivat kaikki pääruhtinaat, Elisama kirjoittaja, Delaja Semajan poika, Elnatan Akborin poika, Gemaria Saphanin poika, ja Zedekia Hannian poika, ja päämiehet kaikki.
verses.king_james: Then he went down into the king’s house, into the scribe’s chamber: and, lo, all the princes sat there, even Elishama the scribe, and Delaiah the son of Shemaiah, and Elnathan the son of Achbor, and Gemariah the son of Shaphan, and Zedekiah the son of Hananiah, and all the princes.

verses.latin_vulgate: et nuntiavit eis Michæas omnia verba quæ audivit, legente Baruch ex volumine in auribus populi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּגֵּ֤ד לָהֶם֙ מִכָ֔יְהוּ אֵ֥ת כׇּל־הַדְּבָרִ֖ים אֲשֶׁ֣ר שָׁמֵ֑עַ בִּקְרֹ֥א בָר֛וּךְ בַּסֵּ֖פֶר בְּאׇזְנֵ֥י הָעָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Micheas told them all the words that he had heard when Baruch read out of the volume in the hearing of the people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Mikaja sanoi heille kaikki ne sanat, jotka hän oli kuullut, kuin Baruk luki kirjasta kansan korvain edessä.
verses.king_james: Then Michaiah declared unto them all the words that he had heard, when Baruch read the book in the ears of the people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Miserunt itaque omnes principes ad Baruch Judi filium Nathaniæ filii Selemiæ filii Chusi, dicentes : Volumen ex quo legisti, audiente populo, sume in manu tua, et veni. Tulit ergo Baruch filius Neriæ volumen in manu sua, et venit ad eos :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלְח֨וּ כׇל־הַשָּׂרִ֜ים אֶל־בָּר֗וּךְ אֶת־יְהוּדִ֡י בֶּן־נְ֠תַנְיָ֠הוּ בֶּן־שֶׁלֶמְיָ֣הוּ בֶן־כּוּשִׁי֮ לֵאמֹר֒ הַמְּגִלָּ֗ה אֲשֶׁ֨ר קָרָ֤אתָ בָּהּ֙ בְּאׇזְנֵ֣י הָעָ֔ם קָחֶ֥נָּה בְיָדְךָ֖ וָלֵ֑ךְ וַ֠יִּקַּ֠ח בָּר֨וּךְ בֶּן־נֵרִיָּ֤הוּ אֶת־הַמְּגִלָּה֙ בְּיָד֔וֹ וַיָּבֹ֖א אֲלֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore all the princes sent Judi the son of Nathanias, the son of Selemias, the son of Chusi, to Baruch, saying: Take in thy hand the volume in which thou hast read in the hearing of the people, and come. So Baruch the son of Nerias took the volume in his hand, and came to them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin lähettivät kaikki pääruhtinaat Juudin Netanian pojan, Selemian pojan, Kusin pojan, Barukin perään, ja käskivät hänelle sanoa: ota myötäs kirja, josta sinä kansan edessä luit, ja tule tänne. Ja Baruk, Nerijan poika otti kirjan myötänsä ja tuli heidän tykönsä.
verses.king_james: Therefore all the princes sent Jehudi the son of Nethaniah, the son of Shelemiah, the son of Cushi, unto Baruch, saying, Take in thine hand the roll wherein thou hast read in the ears of the people, and come. So Baruch the son of Neriah took the roll in his hand, and came unto them.

verses.latin_vulgate: et dixerunt ad eum : Sede, et lege hæc in auribus nostris. Et legit Baruch in auribus eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּאמְר֣וּ אֵלָ֔יו שֵׁ֣ב נָ֔א וּקְרָאֶ֖נָּה בְּאׇזְנֵ֑ינוּ וַיִּקְרָ֥א בָר֖וּךְ בְּאׇזְנֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they said to him: Sit down and read these things in our hearing. And Baruch read in their hearing.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he sanoivat hänelle: istu nyt ja lue, että me saisimme kuulla; ja Baruk luki heidän korvainsa kuullen.
verses.king_james: And they said unto him, Sit down now, and read it in our ears. So Baruch read it in their ears.

verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur cum audissent omnia verba, obstupuerunt unusquisque ad proximum suum, et dixerunt ad Baruch : Nuntiare debemus regi omnes sermones istos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֗י כְּשׇׁמְעָם֙ אֶת־כׇּל־הַדְּבָרִ֔ים פָּחֲד֖וּ אִ֣ישׁ אֶל־רֵעֵ֑הוּ וַיֹּֽאמְרוּ֙ אֶל־בָּר֔וּךְ הַגֵּ֤יד נַגִּיד֙ לַמֶּ֔לֶךְ אֵ֥ת כׇּל־הַדְּבָרִ֖ים הָאֵֽלֶּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when they had heard all the words, they looked upon one another with astonishment, and they said to Baruch: We must tell the king all these words.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin he kaikki sanat olivat kuulleet, peljästyivät he toinen toisensa kanssa, ja sanoivat Barukille: me tahdomme kaiketi ilmoittaa kuninkaalle kaikki nämät sanat.
verses.king_james: Now it came to pass, when they had heard all the words, they were afraid both one and other, and said unto Baruch, We will surely tell the king of all these words.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et interrogaverunt eum, dicentes : Indica nobis quomodo scripsisti omnes sermones istos ex ore ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶ֨ת־בָּר֔וּךְ שָׁאֲל֖וּ לֵאמֹ֑ר הַגֶּד־נָ֣א לָ֔נוּ אֵ֗יךְ כָּתַ֛בְתָּ אֶת־כׇּל־הַדְּבָרִ֥ים הָאֵ֖לֶּה מִפִּֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they asked him, saying: Tell us how didst thou write all these words from his mouth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he kysyivät Barukilta, sanoen: sanos meille, kuinka sinä olet kaikki nämät sanat kirjoittanut hänen suustansa?
verses.king_james: And they asked Baruch, saying, Tell us now, How didst thou write all these words at his mouth?

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit autem eis Baruch : Ex ore suo loquebatur quasi legens ad me omnes sermones istos, et ego scribebam in volumine atramento.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר לָהֶם֙ בָּר֔וּךְ מִפִּיו֙ יִקְרָ֣א אֵלַ֔י אֵ֥ת כׇּל־הַדְּבָרִ֖ים הָאֵ֑לֶּה וַאֲנִ֛י כֹּתֵ֥ב עַל־הַסֵּ֖פֶר בַּדְּיֽוֹ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Baruch said to them: With his mouth he pronounced all these words as if he were reading to me: and I wrote in a volume with ink.
verses.finnish_biblia: Baruk sanoi heille: hän luki minun edessäni kaikki nämät sanat suullansa, ja minä kirjoitin ne pläkillä kirjaan.
verses.king_james: Then Baruch answered them, He pronounced all these words unto me with his mouth, and I wrote them with ink in the book.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixerunt principes ad Baruch : Vade, et abscondere, tu et Jeremias, et nemo sciat ubi sitis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּאמְר֤וּ הַשָּׂרִים֙ אֶל־בָּר֔וּךְ לֵ֥ךְ הִסָּתֵ֖ר אַתָּ֣ה וְיִרְמְיָ֑הוּ וְאִ֥ישׁ אַל־יֵדַ֖ע אֵיפֹ֥ה אַתֶּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the princes said to Baruch: Go, and hide thee, both thou and Jeremiah, and let no man know where you are.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin sanoivat pääruhtinaat Barukille: mene ja lymytä itses Jeremian kanssa, niin ettei kenkään tiedä, kussa te olette.
verses.king_james: Then said the princes unto Baruch, Go, hide thee, thou and Jeremiah; and let no man know where ye be.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ingressi sunt ad regem in atrium : porro volumen commendaverunt in gazophylacio Elisamæ scribæ, et nuntiaverunt, audiente rege, omnes sermones.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֤אוּ אֶל־הַמֶּ֙לֶךְ֙ חָצֵ֔רָה וְאֶת־הַמְּגִלָּ֣ה הִפְקִ֔דוּ בְּלִשְׁכַּ֖ת אֱלִישָׁמָ֣ע הַסֹּפֵ֑ר וַיַּגִּ֙ידוּ֙ בְּאׇזְנֵ֣י הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ אֵ֖ת כׇּל־הַדְּבָרִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they went in to the king into the court: but they laid up the volume in the chamber of Elisama the scribe: and they told all the words in the hearing of the king.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja menivät kuninkaan eteen esihuoneesen, ja antoivat kirjan jäädä kirjoittajan Elisaman makaushuoneesen, ja sanoivat kuninkaan edessä kaikki nämät sanat.
verses.king_james: And they went in to the king into the court, but they laid up the roll in the chamber of Elishama the scribe, and told all the words in the ears of the king.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misitque rex Judi ut sumeret volumen : qui tollens illud de gazophylacio Elisamæ scribæ, legit, audiente rege et universis principibus qui stabant circa regem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלַ֨ח הַמֶּ֜לֶךְ אֶת־יְהוּדִ֗י לָקַ֙חַת֙ אֶת־הַמְּגִלָּ֔ה וַיִּ֨קָּחֶ֔הָ מִלִּשְׁכַּ֖ת אֱלִישָׁמָ֣ע הַסֹּפֵ֑ר וַיִּקְרָאֶ֤הָ יְהוּדִי֙ בְּאׇזְנֵ֣י הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ וּבְאׇזְנֵי֙ כׇּל־הַשָּׂרִ֔ים הָעֹמְדִ֖ים מֵעַ֥ל הַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the king sent Judi that he should take the volume: who bringing it out of the chamber of Elisama the scribe, read it in the hearing of the king, and of all the princes that stood about the king.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin kuningas lähetti Juudin kirjaa noutamaan, ja hän otti sen Elisaman kirjoittajakammiosta; ja Juudi luki sen kuninkaan edessä ja kaikkein pääruhtinasten, jotka seisoivat kuninkaan edessä.
verses.king_james: So the king sent Jehudi to fetch the roll: and he took it out of Elishama the scribe’s chamber. And Jehudi read it in the ears of the king, and in the ears of all the princes which stood beside the king.

verses.latin_vulgate: Rex autem sedebat in domo hiemali, in mense nono, et posita erat arula coram eo plena prunis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַמֶּ֗לֶךְ יוֹשֵׁב֙ בֵּ֣ית הַחֹ֔רֶף בַּחֹ֖דֶשׁ הַתְּשִׁיעִ֑י וְאֶת־הָאָ֖ח לְפָנָ֥יו מְבֹעָֽרֶת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now the king sat in the winter house, in the ninth month: and there was a hearth before him full of burning coals.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta kuningas istui talvihuoneessa yhdeksäntenä kuukautena, ja tuli paloi totossa hänen edessänsä.
verses.king_james: Now the king sat in the winterhouse in the ninth month: and there was a fire on the hearth burning before him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque legisset Judi tres pagellas vel quatuor, scidit illud scalpello scribæ, et projecit in ignem qui erat super arulam, donec consumeretur omne volumen igni qui erat in arula.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֣י ׀ כִּקְר֣וֹא יְהוּדִ֗י שָׁלֹ֣שׁ דְּלָתוֹת֮ וְאַרְבָּעָה֒ יִֽקְרָעֶ֙הָ֙ בְּתַ֣עַר הַסֹּפֵ֔ר וְהַשְׁלֵ֕ךְ אֶל־הָאֵ֖שׁ אֲשֶׁ֣ר אֶל־הָאָ֑ח עַד־תֹּם֙ כׇּל־הַמְּגִלָּ֔ה עַל־הָאֵ֖שׁ אֲשֶׁ֥ר עַל־הָאָֽח׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when Judi had read three or four pages, he cut it with the penknife, and he cast it into the fire, that was upon the hearth, till all the volume was consumed with the fire that was on the hearth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Juudi kolme eli neljä kappaletta oli lukenut, leikkasi hän sen rikki kynäveitsellä ja heitti tuleen, joka totossa oli, siihenasti että kirja peräti paloi tulessa, joka totossa oli.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, that when Jehudi had read three or four leaves, he cut it with the penknife, and cast it into the fire that was on the hearth, until all the roll was consumed in the fire that was on the hearth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et non timuerunt, neque sciderunt vestimenta sua, rex et omnes servi ejus qui audierunt universos sermones istos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹ֣א פָחֲד֔וּ וְלֹ֥א קָרְע֖וּ אֶת־בִּגְדֵיהֶ֑ם הַמֶּ֙לֶךְ֙ וְכׇל־עֲבָדָ֔יו הַשֹּׁ֣מְעִ֔ים אֵ֥ת כׇּל־הַדְּבָרִ֖ים הָאֵֽלֶּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the king and all his servants that heard all these words were not afraid, nor did they rend their garments.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ei kenkään peljästynyt eikä vaatteitansa reväissyt rikki, ei kuningas eikä hänen palveliansa, jotka kuitenkin kaikki nämät sanat olivat kuulleet.
verses.king_james: Yet they were not afraid, nor rent their garments, neither the king, nor any of his servants that heard all these words.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verumtamen Elnathan, et Dalaias, et Gamarias, contradixerunt regi, ne combureret librum : et non audivit eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַם֩ אֶלְנָתָ֨ן וּדְלָיָ֤הוּ וּגְמַרְיָ֙הוּ֙ הִפְגִּ֣עוּ בַמֶּ֔לֶךְ לְבִלְתִּ֥י שְׂרֹ֖ף אֶת־הַמְּגִלָּ֑ה וְלֹ֥א שָׁמַ֖ע אֲלֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: But yet Elnathan, and Dalaias, and Gamarias spoke to the king, not to burn the book: and he heard them not.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaikka Elnatan, Delaja ja Gemaria rukoilivat kuningasta, ettei hän olisi polttanut kirjaa; ei hän kuitenkaan heitä totellut.
verses.king_james: Nevertheless Elnathan and Delaiah and Gemariah had made intercession to the king that he would not burn the roll: but he would not hear them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et præcepit rex Jeremiel filio Amelech, et Saraiæ filio Ezriel, et Selemiæ filio Abdeel, ut comprehenderent Baruch scribam, et Jeremiam prophetam : abscondit autem eos Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְצַוֶּ֣ה הַ֠מֶּ֠לֶךְ אֶת־יְרַחְמְאֵ֨ל בֶּן־הַמֶּ֜לֶךְ וְאֶת־שְׂרָיָ֣הוּ בֶן־עַזְרִיאֵ֗ל וְאֶת־שֶׁלֶמְיָ֙הוּ֙ בֶּֽן־עַבְדְּאֵ֔ל לָקַ֙חַת֙ אֶת־בָּר֣וּךְ הַסֹּפֵ֔ר וְאֵ֖ת יִרְמְיָ֣הוּ הַנָּבִ֑יא וַיַּסְתִּרֵ֖ם יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the king commanded Jeremiel the son of Amelech, and Saraias the son of Ezriel, and Selemias the son of Abdeel, to take up Baruch the scribe, and Jeremiah the prophet: but the Lord hid them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Päälliseksi käski kuningas Jerahmeelin Hammelekin pojan, Serajan Asrielin pojan, ja Selamian Abdeelin pojan, käsittämään Barukia kirjoittajaa ja Jeremiaa prophetaa; mutta Herra oli heidät kätkenyt.
verses.king_james: But the king commanded Jerahmeel the son of Hammelech, and Seraiah the son of Azriel, and Shelemiah the son of Abdeel, to take Baruch the scribe and Jeremiah the prophet: but the Lord hid them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et factum est verbum Domini ad Jeremiam prophetam, postquam combusserat rex volumen et sermones quos scripserat Baruch ex ore Jeremiæ, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֥י דְבַר־יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶֽל־יִרְמְיָ֑הוּ אַחֲרֵ֣י ׀ שְׂרֹ֣ף הַמֶּ֗לֶךְ אֶת־הַמְּגִלָּה֙ וְאֶת־הַדְּבָרִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֨ר כָּתַ֥ב בָּר֛וּךְ מִפִּ֥י יִרְמְיָ֖הוּ לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the word of the Lord came to Jeremiah the prophet, after that the king had burnt the volume, and the words that Baruch had written from the mouth of Jeremiah, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin tapahtui Herran sana Jeremialle, sittekuin kuningas oli polttanut kirjan ja ne sanat, jotka Baruk Jeremian suusta oli kirjoittanut, ja sanoi:
verses.king_james: Then the word of the Lord came to Jeremiah, after that the king had burned the roll, and the words which Baruch wrote at the mouth of Jeremiah, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Rursum tolle volumen aliud, et scribe in eo omnes sermones priores qui erant in primo volumine, quod combussit Joakim rex Juda.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שׁ֥וּב קַח־לְךָ֖ מְגִלָּ֣ה אַחֶ֑רֶת וּכְתֹ֣ב עָלֶ֗יהָ אֵ֤ת כׇּל־הַדְּבָרִים֙ הָרִ֣אשֹׁנִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֣ר הָי֗וּ עַל־הַמְּגִלָּה֙ הָרִ֣אשֹׁנָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר שָׂרַ֖ף יְהוֹיָקִ֥ים מֶלֶךְ־יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Take thee again another volume: and write in it all the former words that were in the first volume which Joakim the king of Juda both burnt.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ota sinulles taas toinen kirja ja kirjoita siihen kaikki entiset sanat, jotka ensimäisessäkin kirjassa olivat, jonka Jojakim, Juudan kuningas, on polttanut.
verses.king_james: Take thee again another roll, and write in it all the former words that were in the first roll, which Jehoiakim the king of Judah hath burned.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ad Joakim regem Juda dices : Hæc dicit Dominus : Tu combussisti volumen illud, dicens : Quare scripsisti in eo annuntians : Festinus veniet rex Babylonis, et vastabit terram hanc, et cessare faciet ex illa hominem et jumentum ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַל־יְהוֹיָקִ֤ים מֶֽלֶךְ־יְהוּדָה֙ תֹּאמַ֔ר כֹּ֖ה אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֑ה אַ֠תָּ֠ה שָׂרַ֜פְתָּ אֶת־הַמְּגִלָּ֤ה הַזֹּאת֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר מַדּ֩וּעַ֩ כָּתַ֨בְתָּ עָלֶ֜יהָ לֵאמֹ֗ר בֹּֽא־יָב֤וֹא מֶֽלֶךְ־בָּבֶל֙ וְהִשְׁחִית֙ אֶת־הָאָ֣רֶץ הַזֹּ֔את וְהִשְׁבִּ֥ית מִמֶּ֖נָּה אָדָ֥ם וּבְהֵמָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And thou shalt say to Joakim the king of Juda: Thus saith the Lord: Thou hast burnt that volume, saying: Why hast thou written therein, and said: The king of Babylon shall come speedily, and shall lay waste this land: and shall cause to cease from thence man and beast?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sano Jojakimille, Juudan kuninkaalle: näin sanoo Herra: sinä olet polttanut sen kirjan ja sanonut; miksi sinä siihen olet kirjoittanut ja sanonut, että Babelin kuningas on kaiketi tuleva ja hävittävä tämän maan, ja tekevä niin, ettei ihmistä eikä karjaa enään siinä pidä oleman?
verses.king_james: And thou shalt say to Jehoiakim king of Judah, Thus saith the Lord; Thou hast burned this roll, saying, Why hast thou written therein, saying, The king of Babylon shall certainly come and destroy this land, and shall cause to cease from thence man and beast?

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea hæc dicit Dominus contra Joakim regem Juda : Non erit ex eo qui sedeat super solium David : et cadaver ejus projicietur ad æstum per diem, et ad gelu per noctem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֞ן כֹּֽה־אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֗ה עַל־יְהֽוֹיָקִים֙ מֶ֣לֶךְ יְהוּדָ֔ה לֹא־יִֽהְיֶה־לּ֥וֹ יוֹשֵׁ֖ב עַל־כִּסֵּ֣א דָוִ֑ד וְנִבְלָתוֹ֙ תִּהְיֶ֣ה מֻשְׁלֶ֔כֶת לַחֹ֥רֶב בַּיּ֖וֹם וְלַקֶּ֥רַח בַּלָּֽיְלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore thus saith the Lord against Joakim the king of Juda: He shall have none to sit upon the throne of David: and his dead body shall be cast out to the heat by day, and to the frost by night.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden sanoo Herra Jojakimista, Juudan kuninkaasta, ei pidä yhtään hänen siemenestänsä istuman Davidin istuimella, ja hänen ruumiinsa pitää heitettämän ulos, makaamaan helteessä päivällä ja vilussa yöllä.
verses.king_james: Therefore thus saith the Lord of Jehoiakim king of Judah; He shall have none to sit upon the throne of David: and his dead body shall be cast out in the day to the heat, and in the night to the frost.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et visitabo contra eum, et contra semen ejus, et contra servos ejus, iniquitates suas : et adducam super eos, et super habitatores Jerusalem, et super viros Juda, omne malum quod locutus sum ad eos, et non audierunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּפָקַדְתִּ֨י עָלָ֧יו וְעַל־זַרְע֛וֹ וְעַל־עֲבָדָ֖יו אֶת־עֲוֺנָ֑ם וְהֵבֵאתִ֣י עֲ֠לֵיהֶ֠ם וְעַל־יֹשְׁבֵ֨י יְרוּשָׁלַ֜͏ִם וְאֶל־אִ֣ישׁ יְהוּדָ֗ה אֵ֧ת כׇּל־הָרָעָ֛ה אֲשֶׁר־דִּבַּ֥רְתִּי אֲלֵיהֶ֖ם וְלֹ֥א שָׁמֵֽעוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will punish him, and his seed and his servants, for their iniquities, and I will bring upon them, and upon the inhabitants of Jerusalem, and upon the men of Juda all the evil that I have pronounced against them, but they have not heard.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä tahdon rangaista häntä ja hänen siementänsä, ja hänen palvelioitansa heidän pahain tekoinsa tähden: ja minä annan tulla heidän päällensä, ja Jerusalemin asuvaisten päälle, ja Juudan miesten päälle, kaiken onnettomuuden, jonka minä heille olen puhunut; ja ei he kuitenkaan tahtoneet kuulla.
verses.king_james: And I will punish him and his seed and his servants for their iniquity; and I will bring upon them, and upon the inhabitants of Jerusalem, and upon the men of Judah, all the evil that I have pronounced against them; but they hearkened not.

verses.latin_vulgate: Jeremias autem tulit volumen aliud, et dedit illud Baruch filio Neriæ scribæ : qui scripsit in eo ex ore Jeremiæ omnes sermones libri quem combusserat Joakim rex Juda igni : et insuper additi sunt sermones multo plures quam antea fuerant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיִרְמְיָ֜הוּ לָקַ֣ח ׀ מְגִלָּ֣ה אַחֶ֗רֶת וַֽיִּתְּנָהּ֮ אֶל־בָּר֣וּךְ בֶּן־נֵרִיָּ֘הוּ֮ הַסֹּפֵר֒ וַיִּכְתֹּ֤ב עָלֶ֙יהָ֙ מִפִּ֣י יִרְמְיָ֔הוּ אֵ֚ת כׇּל־דִּבְרֵ֣י הַסֵּ֔פֶר אֲשֶׁ֥ר שָׂרַ֛ף יְהוֹיָקִ֥ים מֶלֶךְ־יְהוּדָ֖ה בָּאֵ֑שׁ וְע֨וֹד נוֹסַ֧ף עֲלֵיהֶ֛ם דְּבָרִ֥ים רַבִּ֖ים כָּהֵֽמָּה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Jeremiah took another volume, and gave it to Baruch the son of Nerias the scribe: who wrote in it from the mouth of Jeremiah all the words of the book which Joakim the king of Juda had burnt with fire: and there were added besides many more words than had been before.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Jeremia otti toisen kirjan ja antoi Barukille Nerijan pojalle, kirjoittajalle. Ja hän kirjoitti siihen Jeremian suusta kaikki ne sanat, jotka entisessäkin kirjassa olivat, jonka Jojakim, Juudan kuningas, oli tulessa polttanut; ja siihen oli vielä paljon enempi senkaltaisia sanoja lisätty.
verses.king_james: Then took Jeremiah another roll, and gave it to Baruch the scribe, the son of Neriah; who wrote therein from the mouth of Jeremiah all the words of the book which Jehoiakim king of Judah had burned in the fire: and there were added besides unto them many like words.
